hooks.command: FILE=$(echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT" | python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load(sys.stdin); print(d.get('file_path',''))" 2>/dev/null); if echo "$FILE" | grep -qE '^.*/src/[^/]+\.ts$'; then echo '--- typecheck ---'; cd /Users/vaisakhrkrishnan/Documents/personal/actjs && npm run typecheck 2>&1 | tail -10; fi

FILE=$(echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT" | python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load(sys.stdin); print(d.get('file_path',''))" 2>/dev/null); if echo "$FILE" | grep -qE '^.*/tests/[^/]+\.test\.ts$'; then echo '--- tests ---'; cd /Users/vaisakhrkrishnan/Documents/personal/actjs && npx vitest run "$FILE" 2>&1 | tail -15; fi
